description: CompositionWhite soccer training shorts made of 100% polyester, with Dri-Fit technology, elasticated waist, white stripes along the side length and embroidered nike swoosh on right thighFittingComfortWash care Machine wash cold with like colours in gentle action Do not use softeners Do not bleach Professionally wet clean Tumble dry low Remove immediately Do not allow to lie on itself when wet Do not iron Win those goals in style in these soccer training shorts from nike. Replete with a meshed inner lining and Dri-Fit technology, forget about sweat and irritation in these pants, and stay cool and dry even at the peak of a tense game. The elasticated waist stays snug, offering a comfortable fit, while the embroidered swoosh branding enhances your style statement. Team this with Nike soccer shoes and soccer tees for that enhanced performance and style.
